title: Trim and reject empty DTO fields
scenario: Boundary strings often contain whitespace. Normalize only after checking the DTO field exists, then reject empty normalized values explicitly.
instructions: Update the existing TryFrom<RegisterUserDto> implementation to trim both fields and return EmptyEmail or EmptyDisplayName when a trimmed field is empty.

hints.body: Add EmptyEmail and EmptyDisplayName to RegisterUserValidationError.
Keep MissingEmail and MissingDisplayName for absent fields; only use EmptyEmail and EmptyDisplayName after trim().
One complete solution for Trim and reject empty DTO fields is shown below.

completionExplanation: The conversion now distinguishes missing fields from present-but-empty fields, while storing normalized command strings.
